title: Frank Herbert's Children of Dune
description: 36 tracks composed in one month — one of Tyler's most celebrated scores and one of the best-selling TV soundtrack albums of 2003. Portions were later used in the Star Trek (2009) trailer.

title: Hawaii Five-0
description: Tyler reimagined the iconic Morton Stevens theme — assembled original musicians from the 1968 series including David Duke and Chuck Findley. Co-composed all 10 seasons with Keith Power.

title: Terra Nova
description: Large-scale sci-fi adventure series — Tyler scored the full single season run with orchestral prehistoric world-building.

title: Transformers: Prime
description: Full series score — 3 seasons. Tyler wrote sweeping character themes and high-energy action cues for this acclaimed animated series.
accolades: Daytime Emmy nom. — Music Direction & Composition; series won 9 Daytime Emmys

title: Sleepy Hollow
description: Tyler and Lydecker composed the full series including the main title theme. Supernatural procedural with gothic orchestral identity.
accolades: Primetime Emmy nom. — Outstanding Music Composition

title: Scorpion
description: Propulsive tech-inflected orchestral score co-composed with Tony Morales — matching the show's genius-team energy across four seasons.

title: Yellowstone
description: Melancholy impressionistic chamber music — Sheridan played Tyler's music on set before shooting began. Tyler described drawing from Kurosawa's compositional methods for "wide open spaces and the human condition."
accolades: SoundTrackFest Award — Best TV Score 2018; Emmy nom.
notes: 5 seasons; also in Films section as feature entry; co-composer: Breton Vivian

description: Tyler wanted the music to convey "struggle
column14: and resilience" — shares thematic crossover material with 1923.

description: Mosaic of noir speakeasy energy, ranch melancholy, Native displacement, and African landscape — Tyler described it as the most complex canvas he'd worked with. Shares thematic material with 1883.
notes: Yellowstone prequel S2; co-composer: Breton Vivian

title: Magnum P.I.
description: Tyler composed the score and a modernised version of the classic Magnum P.I. theme — maintaining the spirit of the original while updating for a new era.
notes: CBS then NBC; co-composer: Keith Power
